slides.title: You Don't Need IT Experience First
slides.subtitle: The real entry points nobody tells you

bullets: GRC roles hire directly from non-IT backgrounds

caption: Everyone says 'start in helpdesk first.' That's not always true anymore. Here are the entry points nobody talks about. #cybersecurity #cybersecuritycareers #infosec #cypherjobs #entrylevel
